## Agape Sovereign v2.0.0-alpha — Sovereign Pipeline + Autonomous Agents

### Highlights
- Sovereign data pipeline v1 complete (9 agents: ExtractionEngine → Extraction → DataMapper → Validator → Synthesis → Audit → Reporting → PDF → SovereignExport)
- LM Studio integration (qwen3.5-9b-sushi-coder-rl-mlx)
- 166K char extraction from 92-page Operation Framework PDF
- Vertex AI boundary enforcement (document_processing/pdf_rendering only)
- Architect AI MCP server on Cloud Run (gemma4:e2b)
- Agentic workflows (3 autonomous agents running 6h/daily/weekly)
- GCP monitoring agent + daily PDF reports
- Biometric passkey integration for vault/identity zones
- Firebase deploy reliability overhaul (10 root causes fixed)
- All GitHub services active (Issues/Wiki/Actions/Projects/Discussions)

### Known Issues
- Firebase deploy needs `FIREBASE_TOKEN` secret in CI
- gcloud CLI has corrupted `__init__ 2.py` preventing `gcloud firebase` subcommands
- LM Studio/Ollama offline (no local LLM in CI)
- 10 open Dependabot PRs pending merge
- App Check enforcement not yet rolled out
